narrative:
Darby Township has 1,859 registered voters, with 43.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.9 percentage points.
